_meta.description: Next research batch for troparion import

entries.name: Hieromartyr Leo, Bishop of Catania
entries.notes: Leo of Catania (+8th c.), bishop and wonderworker. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: St. Tarasius, Patriarch of Constantinople
entries.notes: Tarasius of Constantinople (+806), patriarch who presided at the Seventh Ecumenical Council (Nicaea II). Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: St. Metrophanes, First Patriarch of Constantinople
entries.notes: Metrophanes of Constantinople (+325), first patriarch. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Blessed Augustine, Bishop of Hippo
entries.notes: Augustine of Hippo (+430), Doctor of the Western Church. Venerated in Byzantine Menaion on Jun 15. Eastern troparion text not securely confirmed for corpus.

entries.name: St. Tikhon, Bishop of Amathous in Cyprus
entries.notes: Tikhon of Amathous (+5th c.), Cypriot bishop and wonder-worker. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Translation of the Robe of Our Lord Jesus Christ to Moscow
entries.notes: Translation of a portion of the robe of Christ to Moscow (1625). Russian Orthodox calendar. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: St. Emilian the Confessor, Bishop of Cyzicus
entries.notes: Emilian of Cyzicus (+9th c.), confessor bishop under the Second Iconoclasm. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Sts. Alexander, John, and Paul the New, Patriarchs of Constantinople
entries.notes: Alexander (+340), John (+595), and Paul the New (+784), patriarchs of Constantinople. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: St. Eumenios, Bishop of Gortyna
entries.notes: Eumenios of Gortyna (+7th c.), wonder-working bishop of Crete. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: St. Hierotheos, Bishop of Athens
entries.notes: Hierotheos of Athens (+1st c.), companion of Dionysius, ordained by Paul. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Equal-to-the-Apostles Abercius, Bishop of Hieropolis
entries.notes: Abercius of Hieropolis (+2nd c.), bishop and wonder-worker, known from his famous epitaph. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Our Father among the Saints Amphilochius, Bishop of Iconium
entries.notes: Amphilochius of Iconium, friend of the Cappadocian Fathers, +394. Rank 3. Also: Afterfeast of Entrance continues. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus; the feast troparion (Entrance) would normally be sung alongside.
